---
title: Publications
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Selected publications

A curated list of key publications from the Thornton Lab. For a complete list, see Dr. Thornton's [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/) profile.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Referencing papers
This page uses a BibTeX bibliography (`references.bib`). Add your references there and cite them with `@key` syntax. For example: `@einstein1905` renders as @einstein1905.
:::

### 2025

@einstein1905 — This is a placeholder entry demonstrating the citation system.

### How to add references

1. Add BibTeX entries to `references.bib`
2. Cite them in any `.qmd` file with `@citationkey`
3. The bibliography renders automatically at the bottom of pages that contain citations

## Publications by friends of our lab

A selection of recent work from colleagues and collaborators at other institutions.

### 2026

@Ahrens2026

@Beyene2026

@Dudman2026

@EspinosaMedina2026

@Harris2026

@Hermundstad2026

@Hess2026

@Lavis2026

@Li2026

@LippincottSchwartz2026

@LiuZhe2026

@OShea2026

@Pachitariu2026

@Rubin2026

@Satou2026

@Schreiter2026

@Schulze2026

@Sgro2026

@WongCampos2026

### 2025

@AguileraCastrejon2025

@Aso2025

@Betzig2025

@Branson2025

@Dennis2025

@Jayaraman2025

@Koay2025

@Pedram2025

@Reiser2025

@Romani2025

@Saalfeld2025

@Shroff2025

@Spruston2025

@Tebo2025

@WangMeng2025

### 2024

@Karpova2024

@Keller2024

@Otopalik2024

@Voigts2024

### 2020

@Johnson2020

## References
